mapper.select:
select * from requestBBS where 1 = 1 and reqDepth = 0
and reqStatus < 3
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by reqRef desc, reqPos asc
select * from requestBBS where reqRef = #{reqRef} and reqDepth = 0
select * from requestBBS where reqRef = #{reqRef} and reqDepth > 0 and reqStatus < 3 order by reqPos asc, reqNum asc
select coalesce(max(reqPos), 0) from requestBBS where reqRef = #{reqRef}
mapper.insert: insert into requestBBS ( reqUid, reqTitle, reqContent, reqRegDate, reqPos, reqRef, reqDepth, parentReqNum, reqOriUid, reqStatus, createdDate, createdBy, updatedDate, updatedBy ) values ( #{reqUid}, #{reqTitle}, #{reqContent}, now(), #{reqPos}, #{reqRef}, #{reqDepth}, #{parentReqNum}, #{reqOriUid}, #{reqStatus}, current_timestamp, coalesce(#{createdBy}, #{reqUid}), current_timestamp, coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{reqUid}) )
mapper.update: update requestBBS set reqTitle = #{reqTitle}, reqContent = #{reqContent}, reqStatus = #{reqStatus}, updatedDate = current_timestamp, updatedBy = coalesce(#{updatedBy}, #{reqUid}) where reqNum = #{reqNum}
update requestBBS set reqStatus = 3, updatedDate = current_timestamp where reqRef = #{reqRef}
update requestBBS set reqStatus = 3, updatedDate = current_timestamp where reqNum = #{reqNum}
